query.name: list
query.sql: SELECT e.id, e.user_id, e.account_id, a.name AS account_name, e.category_id, c.name AS category_name, e.entry_type, e.amount, e.entry_date, e.remark, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM ml_entry e INNER JOIN ml_category c ON c.id = e.category_id INNER JOIN ml_account a ON a.id = e.account_id WHERE e.user_id = ${@user_id} #AND_CLAUSE# ORDER BY e.entry_date DESC, e.id DESC

query.name: getById
query.sql: SELECT e.id, e.user_id, e.account_id, a.name AS account_name, e.category_id, c.name AS category_name, e.entry_type, e.amount, e.entry_date, e.remark, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM ml_entry e INNER JOIN ml_category c ON c.id = e.category_id INNER JOIN ml_account a ON a.id = e.account_id WHERE e.id = ${@id} AND e.user_id = ${@user_id}

collisionSql.where: NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_account WHERE id = ${@account_id} AND user_id = ${@user_id})
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_category WHERE id = ${@category_id} AND user_id = ${@user_id} AND type = ${@entry_type})
collisionSql.message: 分类不存在或与收支类型不匹配

sqls.executeSql: INSERT INTO ml_entry (user_id, account_id, category_id, entry_type, amount, entry_date, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (${@user_id}, ${@account_id}, ${@category_id}, ${@entry_type}, ${@amount}, ${@entry_date}, TRIM(${@remark}), NOW(), NOW())

collisionSql.where: NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_entry WHERE id = ${@id} AND user_id = ${@user_id})
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_account WHERE id = ${@account_id} AND user_id = ${@user_id})
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_category WHERE id = ${@category_id} AND user_id = ${@user_id} AND type = ${@entry_type})
collisionSql.message: 分类不存在或与收支类型不匹配

sqls.executeSql: UPDATE ml_entry SET account_id = ${@account_id}, category_id = ${@category_id}, entry_type = ${@entry_type}, amount = ${@amount}, entry_date = ${@entry_date}, remark = TRIM(${@remark}), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = ${@id} AND user_id = ${@user_id}

collisionSql.where: NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_entry WHERE id = ${@id} AND user_id = ${@user_id})

sqls.executeSql: DELETE FROM ml_entry WHERE id = ${@id} AND user_id = ${@user_id}
